title: Product
description: Implementation of the 'Product' model. Represents a product.

ProductId.description: The unique ID associated with product.

Id.description: The barcode number of the product. This is the `PurchasedItems[].BarcodeId` returned from GET Sales.

CategoryId.description: The revenue category ID of the product. Use this ID when calling the GET Categories endpoint.

SubCategoryId.description: The SubCategory ID of the product. Use this ID when calling the GET Categories endpoint.

SecondaryCategoryId.description: The SecondaryCategory ID of the product. Use this ID when calling the GET Categories endpoint.

TaxIncluded.description: If tax inclusive-pricing is enabled, this field shows how much tax was added to the price. To fetch this value `LocationId` must be passed as a query parameter.

TaxRate.description: The tax rate that was applied to this purchase. To fetch this value `LocationId` must be passed as a query parameter.

GroupId.description: The unique ID of the product group.

OnlinePrice.description: The online price of the product.

ShortDescription.description: A short text description of the product.
ShortDescription.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

LongDescription.description: A long, more detailed text description of the product.
LongDescription.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

TypeGroup.description: The Type group of the product.

SupplierId.description: The unique ID of the supplier of product.

SupplierName.description: The Supplier Name of the product.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image associated with this product.

Color.description: Contains information about color of the product.

Size.description: Contains information about the size of the product.

ManufacturerId.description: The ID number attributed to the product by the manufacturer.
